description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a variable S3_BUCKET_NAME set to resume.filiosoft.net and a single stage named deploy. Add a deploy-production job that runs in the deploy stage, uses the filiosoft/aws-cli:latest Docker image, is allowed to fail, targets the production environment at https://resume.filiosoft.net, and executes the command "aws s3 cp ./ s3://$S3_BUCKET_NAME/ --recursive --exclude \".git\" --include \"*\"". Add a pages job also in the deploy stage, runs only on the master branch, uses a Docker runner (tag docker), sets up a pages environment at https://oss.filiosoft.net/resume, runs the commands "mkdir .public", "cp -r * .public", and "mv .public public", and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
